data.title: Binance will list 4 tokens and trading pairs including MUBARAK
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance will list Mubarak (MUBARAK), CZ'SDog (BROCCOLI714), Tutorial (TUT) and BananaForScale (BANANAS31) at 21:00 (UTC) on March 27, 2025, and open MUBARAK/USDT, MUBARAK/USDC, BROCCOLI714/USDT, BROCCOLI714/USDC, TUT/USDT, TUT/USDC, BANANAS31/USDT, BANANAS31/USDC trading pairs. Users can start depositing 1 hour before trading opens, and withdrawals will be open at 21:00 (UTC) on March 28, 2025. (This newsletter is generated with the assistance of AI)

data.title: Binance Alpha Launches Ghiblification (Ghibli)

data.title: Ripple Agrees To Pay $50,000,000 Fine To Conclude SEC Lawsuit Once and for All
data.description:
Ripple chief legal officer Stuart Alderoty says that the end of the legal battle between the blockchain company and the U. S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) is nearing its conclusion. In a post on the social media platform X, Alderoty says that Ripple is ending its appeal against the SEC
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/03/27/ripple-agrees-to-pay-50000000-fine-to-conclude-sec-lawsuit-once-and-for-all/

data.title: Senate Delays Vote on SEC Chairman Paul Atkins
data.description:
Senate Banking Committee delays voting on Paul Atkins for SEC Chair; date TBD.
source: https://coincu.com/328949-senate-delays-sec-chair-vote

data.title: California judge dropped ICP investor (DFINITY) lawsuit due to expired statute of limitations
data.description:
U. S. District Judge James Donato dismissed a class action lawsuit against DFINITY, the crypto company behind Internet Computer (ICO), on Tuesday. The judge found the case “time-barred” under the Securities Exchange Act’s three-year statute of repose.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/california-judge-dropped-dfinity-lawsuit/

data.title: On-Chain Data Shows Dogecoin At A Crucial Inflection Point
data.description:
Crypto analyst Ali Martinez (@ali_charts) published a new UTXO Realized Price Distribution (URPD) chart on X that offers a deep look at where large chunks of DOGE have last changed hands. This histogram shows distinct clusters of on-chain activity, pinpointing the most significant price levels that could define the meme coin’s next major move. Martinez specifically singled out $0. 177 as strong support and $0
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/dogecoin/on-chain-dogecoin-crucial-inflection-point/

data.title: Cosmos developers bring IBC to Ethereum in landmark interoperability test
data.description:
Cosmos developers are working to extend the Inter-Blockchain Communication (IBC) protocol to Ethereum.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/cosmos-developers-bring-ibc-to-ethereum/

data.title: US Treasury could sanction Tornado Cash again if court accepts ‘moot’ notice
data.description:
The US Treasury submitted a notice declaring the Tornado Cash court case as "moot," which may result in its dismissal.
source: https://protos.com/us-treasury-could-sanction-tornado-cash-again-if-court-accepts-moot-notice/

data.title: Elizabeth Warren Slams SEC Chair Nominee for Potential Crypto 'Pre-Bribe'
data.description:
The senator, a noted crypto skeptic, has raised conflict of interest concerns toward stablecoin legislation as well.
source: https://decrypt.co/311992/elizabeth-warren-slams-sec-chair-nominee
